Home / Engg-Projects / American Sign Language Detection System

American Sign Language Detection System

CNN-based real-time ASL gesture recognition system.

Computer VisionEngineering

Overview

Computer vision system that trains CNNs to recognise American Sign Language gestures in real-time from video input.

Key Contributions

  • Real-time ASL gesture recognition.
  • Custom CNN architecture for gesture classification.

Research & Engineering Challenges

  • Variations in lighting and background
  • Real-time performance

Tech Stack

Python TensorFlow / Keras OpenCV CNN

Status

Completed

Author

Venkat Chavan N
